'''Yabosta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Yabosta system/Legends|Yabosta system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was orbited by at least two [[Moon/Legends|moons]], the second of which was called [[Skalokor]]. [[Port Kalla]] was one of the largest cities on the planet, and its primary [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].<ref name="JL" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|10|Jedi's Legacy}}
